tax.pageDescription: PPN rate (percent) applied to PO line cost when the line is set to "Exclude PPN". Used for work order material cost calculation.

documents.pageDescription: Configure prefix, reset period, and padding per document type. Changes apply to new documents only.

security.passwordMismatch: New password and confirmation do not match
security.noPasswordSet: No password set for this account

hpp.title: HPP (Harga Pokok Produksi)
hpp.subtitle: Cost of goods manufactured per work order — fabric, accessories, and service costs
hpp.cardDescription: Per-WO cost breakdown: fabric, accessories, service, margin, and selling price.
hpp.noRows: No work orders match the filters.
hpp.name: Name
hpp.helpIntro: HPP (Harga Pokok Produksi) aggregates fabric, accessories, and service costs per piece. Selling price = HPP × (1 + margin%) + additional cost.
hpp.helpWhenStored: When production receives finished goods (via Work Order receipt), the system stores on each receipt:
hpp.helpMaterialCost: Material cost — total cost of materials issued for that production
hpp.helpAvgCostPerUnit: Avg cost per unit — total cost (e.g. material + CMT if applicable) divided by quantity received
hpp.helpTableExplanation: The table shows for each work order: cost layers, HPP per piece, PPN status (Mixed if costs have mixed PPN), margin, and selling price.
hpp.helpFuture: Labor/CMT and overhead can be included in future updates via WO or allocation rules.
